author: Tim Düsterhus
description: Adminer (formerly phpMinAdmin) is a full-featured database management tool written in PHP. Conversely to phpMyAdmin, it consist of a single file ready to deploy to the target server. Adminer is available for MySQL, PostgreSQL, SQLite, MS SQL, Oracle, Firebird, SimpleDB, Elasticsearch and MongoDB.
tagline: Database management in a single PHP file
releaseNotes:
- v5.4.1 fixes unlinking NULL primary keys from SQL command.
- CSV export no longer quotes zero values, and imports warn when upload_max_filesize is exceeded.
- Saved SQL command queries can be prolonged to the URL, and MySQL routine definition display was fixed.
title: Adminer
